import duckdb

DB_PATH = r"/Users/as-mac-1346/Desktop/GenAi/Github_GenAi/sigma-genai-de/day10/lab/sigma_platform.duckdb"

def run_corrected_report():
    conn = duckdb.connect(DB_PATH, read_only=True)

    df = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM silver_transactions WHERE status = 'COMPLETED'").fetchdf()

    total_revenue = df["amount"].sum()

    print("Total Successful Revenue: " + str(total_revenue))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_corrected_report()
